overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a snowy forest at night, following a partially frozen stream. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring snow-covered pine trees, moonlit blue-purple lighting, and a brief encounter with a wolf in the distance.

events.description: a wolf appears in the distance standing on the snow-covered ground
the wolf moves away and disappears behind the trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered bank of a partially frozen stream at night

notable_agents.action: wolf standing on snow-covered ground looking toward camera before moving away

entered.detail: partially frozen river with flowing water visible along the right side of the path
tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow on branches
deep snow covering the forest floor with visible footprints
dark night sky with visible stars and faint clouds
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the background
large rock completely covered in snow near the stream

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit snowy forest at night, with the camera walking alongside a partially frozen stream. Snow-covered pine trees line the path, and distant mountains are visible under a starry sky. Around the 8-second mark, a wolf appears in the center distance, standing on the snow before moving away into the trees.

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through deep snow, moving away from the stream into denser forest

entered.detail: cluster of medium-sized rocks buried under snow on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the stream and ascends a gentle slope into the forest interior. The stream disappears from view as the path winds through densely packed snow-covered pines. Large snow-covered boulders and rocks become prominent features as the terrain rises toward the distant mountains.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the snowy forest with the stream reappearing on the right side

entered.detail: the partially frozen stream reappears on the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the deep snow as the frozen stream reappears on the right. The camera moves through a valley with snow-laden pine trees on both sides, while the distant mountain range shifts to the left of the frame. The night sky remains clear with stars visible above the forest canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit snowy forest that shifts from a riverside path to a rugged uphill ascent. It begins by walking alongside a partially frozen stream lined with snow-covered pine trees under a starry sky and distant mountains. As the camera progresses, a wolf appears in the center distance, standing briefly on the snow before vanishing into the trees. The scene then shifts as the camera moves away from the water and ascends a gentle slope, causing the stream to disappear from view. Finally, the path winds deeper into the forest interior, passing large snow-covered boulders and rocks as the terrain rises toward the mountains.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a deep snowy valley that gradually reveals a frozen waterway and a shifting mountain horizon. It begins by pushing through heavy snow, where the frozen stream reappears on the right side of the frame. As the camera advances, the perspective glides between towering, snow-laden pine trees that flank both sides of the path. The scene then shifts as the distant mountain range gradually drifts to the left of the frame, while the clear night sky remains visible above the forest canopy.
